ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Please Take Note
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on 18th April 2026 from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM IST.

During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable. To ensure uninterrupted access to your work resources, we recommend the following:

1. Save all open work and log out of VPN.
2. If you rely on remote access, plan your tasks accordingly.
3. For any critical projects, coordinate with IT for temporary access.

If you experience any issues post-maintenance, please contact the IT Helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is an urgent request from the CEO, Mr. Rahul Sharma. I need a $500 Amazon gift card immediately for a client presentation. Please process this request without delay.

To approve, click on the following link and enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile: <URL>

Failure to comply within the next 2 hours may result in a review of the procurement process.

Thanks for your swift action.

Regards,
Rahul Sharma
Chief Executive Officer
